calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-11-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Petitioner: Alex Tsu-Hsiung Chao, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Tsu-Hsiung Chao.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-09-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Tsu-Hsiung Chao, present in pro per, failed to provide a Proof Of Publication to the Court.
Matter is ordered off-calendar.
